LegalPrivacy.metaDescription: How CureCompass collects, uses, and protects your personal data.
LegalPrivacy.subtitle: Privacy Policy – CureCompass
LegalPrivacy.intro: CureCompass (“we”, “our”, “us”) respects your privacy and is committed to protecting your personal data. This Privacy Policy explains what information we collect, how we use it, and your rights.
LegalPrivacy.s1Intro: We may collect the following types of information:
LegalPrivacy.s1d1: Questions you submit to the AI assistant
LegalPrivacy.s1d2: Uploaded documents (if the feature is used)
LegalPrivacy.s1Note: We do not use your data to make medical decisions.
LegalPrivacy.s2u1: Provide and operate the CureCompass service
LegalPrivacy.s3p1: We do not sell your personal data.
LegalPrivacy.s3p2: We may share data with trusted service providers such as:
LegalPrivacy.s3p3: These providers only process data necessary to perform their services.
LegalPrivacy.s4Intro: We retain your data only as long as necessary to:
LegalPrivacy.s4p2: You may request deletion of your data at any time.
LegalPrivacy.s5Intro: Depending on your location, you may have the right to:
LegalPrivacy.s5ContactIntro: To exercise these rights, contact us at:
LegalPrivacy.s6p1: We implement reasonable technical and organizational measures to protect your data.
LegalPrivacy.s6p2: However, no system is completely secure.
LegalPrivacy.s7p1: CureCompass provides educational research summaries only.
LegalPrivacy.s7p3: Always consult a qualified medical professional.
LegalPrivacy.s8p1: We may use basic cookies or analytics tools to improve the service. You can control cookies via your browser settings.
LegalPrivacy.s9p1: Your data may be processed on servers outside your country. By using the service, you consent to such processing.
LegalPrivacy.s10p1: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Updates will be posted on this page.

LegalTerms.metaDescription: Terms of use for the CureCompass service.
LegalTerms.subtitle: Terms of Use – CureCompass
LegalTerms.intro: By using CureCompass, you agree to these Terms.
LegalTerms.s1p2: It is intended for informational purposes only.
LegalTerms.s2p2: You must consult qualified medical professionals for any health decisions.
LegalTerms.s3p1: You must be at least 18 years old (or have parental consent) to use the service.
LegalTerms.s4u2: Attempt to hack or disrupt services
LegalTerms.s4u4: Rely solely on the platform for medical decisions
LegalTerms.s5p1: AI-generated content may contain inaccuracies or be incomplete.
LegalTerms.s5p2: You understand and accept that AI outputs are not guaranteed to be correct.
LegalTerms.s6p1: All content, branding, and technology related to CureCompass are owned by us.
LegalTerms.s6p2: You may not copy, reproduce, or distribute without permission.
LegalTerms.s7u1: If you upload documents, you retain ownership.
LegalTerms.s7u2: You grant us permission to process them for service functionality.
LegalTerms.s7u3: We do not claim ownership of your personal documents.
LegalTerms.s8Intro: To the maximum extent permitted by law, CureCompass is not liable for:
LegalTerms.s8u1: Medical decisions made based on the platform
LegalTerms.s9Intro: We may suspend or terminate access if:
LegalTerms.s10p1: We may update these Terms at any time. Continued use constitutes acceptance of updated terms.
LegalTerms.s11p1: These Terms are governed by applicable laws in your jurisdiction.
